---
title: "Luke Lawrence"
---

## About

Hi, I'm Luke — a Math major (Computer Science minor) at Seattle University, expected June 2027, working at the intersection of stochastic calculus, machine learning, and numerical computing.

My recent work spans stochastic volatility modeling and option pricing, Gaussian process metamodeling for financial valuation, and undergraduate research in non-Euclidean geometry (recipient of the Jane E. Mills Award for Undergraduate Research in Mathematics). I've also shipped full-stack, LLM-backed product features as a software engineering intern.

- **[Projects](projects.qmd)** — quant finance, ML, and scientific computing builds
- **[Research](research.qmd)** — write-ups and explorations

Reach me at [lukalawrence24@gmail.com](mailto:lukalawrence24@gmail.com), on [GitHub](https://github.com/diffeqsolver), or on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/luke-lawrence-math/).
